name: goodreads profile
description: Goodreads user profile including display name, reading statistics, shelf counts, and average rating.

profileUrl.description: Full URL to the user's Goodreads profile page

location.description: User's location as shown on their profile

avatarUrl.description: URL to the user's profile avatar image

additionalProperties.description: Number of books on this shelf

stats.description: Additional reading statistics from the profile page

averageUserRating.description: User's average star rating across all rated books (e.g. '3.5')

totalBooks.description: Total number of books across all shelves

totalRated.description: Number of books the user has given a star rating
